name: binance-smallcap-agent-harness

data_sources: Binance USD-M Futures public REST API

ALLOUSDT.thesis: Post-confirmation short monitor after confirmed break below 0.2300. Do not repeat the break alert; only notify on rebound failure, short momentum weakening, squeeze-risk change, or a later crowded-short squeeze that fails at high resistance.
event_gates: Notify if price rebounds into 0.2050-0.2180 or 0.2180-0.2300 and 5m/15m taker flow rolls bearish while OI is stable or rising.
Notify if price reclaims 0.2050 and 0.2180 with improving 15m structure, suggesting short momentum is weakening.
Notify if funding and positioning become unusually short-crowded while price stops falling, creating squeeze risk.
Notify if a later crowded-short squeeze tags 0.475-0.486 but fails back below 0.458-0.460, especially when OI starts contracting.
Notify if price breaks down into 0.353-0.364 after the failed squeeze with OI contracting, marking high-volatility deleveraging rather than a fresh low-risk short entry.
Do not chase the deleveraging tail; wait for 0.353-0.364 or 0.396-0.425 retest failure, or for 0.458-0.460 reclaim to weaken the short thesis.

LABUSDT.thesis: Whale-long thesis monitor after violent rally: negative funding plus short crowd can be squeeze fuel only if price defends support or reclaims pressure with OI stable/rising.
event_gates: Notify validation if price holds support or fake-breaks then reclaims with OI stable/rising and global accounts still short-crowded.
Notify validation if price breaks above 16.4 with squeeze-like taker buy and stable/rising OI.
Notify invalidation if price loses 14.8 then retests and fails, or loses 13.8 with OI rising and effective taker sell.
Notify learning event if negative funding plus short crowd fails to produce a squeeze, or an apparent squeeze fails quickly.

OPNUSDT.thesis: Distribution-vs-potential monitor: after a sharp run, separate controlled support absorption from high-area failed retest and sell-effective OI expansion.
event_gates: Notify distribution watch if retest pressure fails with OI stable/rising and taker sell effective.
Notify potential validation if support holds and price reclaims 0.207-0.215 with taker buy and OI stable/rising.
Notify invalidation if price loses support absorption with OI rising and taker sell effective.

learning_rules: Negative funding is fuel, not proof; price structure must confirm it.
OI expansion is only useful when paired with directionally effective taker flow.
For small caps, a failed reclaim after a vertical rally is often more informative than raw long-short ratios.
A thesis should be logged as validation, invalidation, or learning event so future rules can be improved.
